setupWizard.welcomeSubtitle: Let's personalize your workspace in a few quick steps. Everything can be changed later in Settings.
setupWizard.perspectiveSubtitle: We'll tailor the interface to highlight what matters most to you
setupWizard.colorSubtitle: This color will be used across buttons, highlights and indicators
setupWizard.themeSubtitle: How do you like your workspace to look?
setupWizard.languageSubtitle: The interface will adapt to your preferred language
setupWizard.densitySubtitle: How much information do you want to see at once?
setupWizard.emailSubtitle: How do you like to work with your inbox?
setupWizard.profileSubtitle: Add a photo and name so your team recognizes you
setupWizard.readySubtitle: Your workspace is configured and ready to go. You can always change these settings later.
setupWizard.notificationsSubtitle: Stay on top of what matters without the noise
setupWizard.desktopNotificationsDesc: Get notified about new emails and events

setupWizard.notifPermDeniedHint: Allow notifications for this site in your browser settings, then try again.
setupWizard.soundAlertsDesc: Play a sound when new messages arrive
setupWizard.ambientBackgroundDesc: Subtle accent-colored glow behind all screens
setupWizard.workModeSubtitle: This helps us tailor the workspace to your needs
setupWizard.workMode_solo_desc: I work independently or as a freelancer
setupWizard.workMode_team_desc: I work with a team or organization
setupWizard.roleSubtitle: We'll prioritize the tools that matter most for your role

setupWizard.role_admin_desc: I manage systems, users and infrastructure
setupWizard.role_project_manager_desc: I plan, track and deliver projects
setupWizard.role_team_member_desc: I work on tasks assigned to me

setupWizard.mod_kanban_boards_desc: Kanban boards with cards, labels, checklists, attachments and progress tracking
setupWizard.mod_board_pro_desc: Financial layer, automations, multi-lens views and executive reports for boards
setupWizard.mod_project_hub_desc: Spaces, folders, workload planner, team presence and task dependencies
setupWizard.mod_crm_pro_desc: Client management, deals pipeline, invoicing, contracts and client portal
setupWizard.mod_chat_desc: Real-time messaging, channels, voice and video calls, huddles and file sharing
setupWizard.mod_team_desc: Colleagues, groups, department structure, sick leave tracking and shared resources
setupWizard.mod_automation_hub_desc: Visual workflow automation with triggers, conditions, actions and monitoring
setupWizard.mod_email_marketing_desc: Mailing lists, bulk email campaigns with scheduling, tracking and delivery reports
setupWizard.mod_moodboards_desc: Creative canvas for design boards, image collections, color palettes and sharing
setupWizard.mod_news_reader_desc: RSS headlines in a bottom ticker and a Flipboard-style reader — stay informed without leaving mail

setupWizard.undoSendDesc: Delay sending so you can take it back right after clicking Send

landingView.cloudFileStorageWithDocument: Cloud file storage with a built-in document editor, real-time collaboration, presentations, spreadsheets, and shared team folders.
landingView.crmstyleClientManagementWithEmail: CRM-style client management with linked email history, invoicing, financial tracking, time logs, and contact organization for your business.
landingView.fullImapEmailClientWith: Full IMAP email client with threaded conversations, custom filters, labels, smart search, email rules, and multi-account support including Google and Microsoft OAuth.
landingView.kanbanstyleTaskBoardsWithMilestones: Kanban-style task boards with milestones, checklists, due dates, assignees, and progress tracking to keep your projects on schedule.
landingView.longDescription: FlowOne.Pro is a secure business email and collaboration platform. It allows users to send and receive emails, manage calendars, organize tasks on boards, store files in a cloud drive, communicate via team chat with video calls, and manage client relationships — all within a single unified web application.
landingView.metaDescription: FlowOne.Pro is a secure business email and collaboration platform. Send and receive emails, manage calendars, organize tasks, store files, and communicate with your team.
landingView.ogDescription: FlowOne.Pro is a secure business email and collaboration platform.
landingView.publicAccessibleNotice: FlowOne.Pro is publicly accessible and does not require login to view this page.
landingView.realtimeMessagingWithChannelsThreads: Real-time messaging with channels, threads, huddles, video calls via LiveKit, file sharing, and emoji reactions for team communication.
landingView.secondaryDescription: FlowOne.Pro is developed and operated by Pixel Ranger Studio. The application uses Google OAuth for secure authentication, allowing users to sign in with their Google account.
landingView.sharedCalendarsEventSchedulingAnd: Shared calendars with event scheduling, recurring events, reminders, and Google Calendar sync for seamless team coordination.
landingView.aiAssistantDesc: AI-powered email summaries, smart reply suggestions, and intelligent content analysis to help you work faster and stay informed.
landingView.automationsDesc: Visual workflow builder with triggers, conditions, and actions. Connect your apps, automate repetitive tasks, and create custom integrations.
landingView.crmProDesc: Advanced sales pipeline, automated sequences, invoicing with PDF export, and a full CRM dashboard for managing your business relationships.
landingView.emailMarketingDesc: Create and manage email campaigns with mailing lists, audience segmentation, unsubscribe management, and delivery tracking.
landingView.moodboardsDesc: Visual design canvas with layers, drawing tools, image sets, presentations, color palettes, and shareable boards for creative projects.
landingView.timeTrackerDesc: Track time spent on tasks and projects, log hours for clients, and generate detailed time reports for billing and productivity.
landingView.clientPortalDesc: Branded external portal for your clients with secure document sharing, project updates, video calls, and access request management.
landingView.boardProDesc: Enhanced project boards with revenue tracking, time views, client association, and financial overviews for complete project management.
landingView.tasksDesc: Personal to-do lists and task management with priorities, due dates, and quick capture to keep your daily work organized.

linkDevice.title: Sign in to FlowOne?
linkDevice.subtitle: A device is asking to sign in to your account.
linkDevice.tapMatching: Tap the number shown on the other device
linkDevice.wrongNumber: That number doesn't match. Check the other device and try again.
linkDevice.approvedBody: You can return to the other device - it's signing in now.
linkDevice.deniedBody: No device was signed in. You can close this page.
linkDevice.expiredBody: This sign-in request timed out. Start again from the other device.
linkDevice.invalidBody: This sign-in link is invalid or has already been used.
linkDevice.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
linkDevice.securityNote: Only approve sign-ins you started yourself.

deviceApproval.title: Approve sign-in?
deviceApproval.subtitle: A device is trying to sign in to your account.
deviceApproval.tapMatching: Tap the number shown on that device
deviceApproval.wrongNumber: That number doesn't match. Check the other device and try again.
deviceApproval.approvedBody: The other device is signing in now.
deviceApproval.blockedBody: That IP can no longer request sign-in to your account.
deviceApproval.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
deviceApproval.securityNote: Only approve sign-ins you started yourself.

loginView.loggedOutDueToInactivity: You were logged out due to inactivity

oauthErrors.stateExpired: Login session expired, please try again

loginView.signInWithAnotherDevice: Sign in by approving from another device
loginView.deviceIntro: Enter your email. We'll show a number here, and a prompt will pop up on a device where you're already signed in (browser or another phone). Tap the matching number there to sign in.
loginView.deviceApproveInstruction: On a device where you're already signed in, a prompt will appear — tap this number to approve.
loginView.qrIntro: Enter your email and we'll show a QR code. Approve it from a device where you're already signed in.
loginView.qrApprovePrompt: Scan this from the FlowOne app on a signed-in phone, or open it on a signed-in device, then confirm the number below.
loginView.qrMatchNumber: Confirm this number on the other device
loginView.qrExpired: This code expired. Generate a new one.
loginView.qrDenied: The request was denied on the other device.
loginView.qrError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
loginView.qrServerUnreachable: Couldn't reach the server for that email. Check your connection and try again.

privacyPolicyView.contactIntro: For any questions regarding data processing, please contact us at the following email address:
privacyPolicyView.intro: The application follows the data management principles outlined below:
privacyPolicyView.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for FlowOne.Pro. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacyPolicyView.purposeBody: Data is processed solely to provide and improve the application's features and functionality.
privacyPolicyView.rightsBody: Users are entitled to request information about their stored data, as well as request its modification or deletion.
privacyPolicyView.scopeBody: The application only processes data that is strictly necessary for its operation. We do not share personal data with third parties, nor do we use it for marketing purposes.
privacyPolicyView.storageBody: We handle data securely and take all reasonable technical measures to protect it.
privacyPolicyView.transferBody: The application does not sell, lease, or share user data with third parties.

desc.tiering: Currently being moved to cold storage. Downloads will work but may be slower.
desc.cold: On NAS only. First download will take a bit longer.
desc.recalling: Bringing back to fast storage now.

admin.title: Storage Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Tiered storage + reclaim daemon + backup pipeline.
admin.unverifiedHint: HMAC key not readable by web user — data shown is unverified
admin.stateUnreadable: State file exists but is not readable. Check filesystem permissions.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.queueNotWritable: Queue dir is not writable by the web user — buttons will fail until perms are fixed.

actions.disabledKillSwitch: Kill switch is OFF — flip the phase flag on first

freeze.title: FREEZE all storage subsystems
freeze.desc: Emergency stop. Every NAS-touching subsystem will refuse to write until you unfreeze. Reads remain allowed.
freeze.tooltip: Emergency stop — halts every NAS write across all subsystems

unfreeze.title: Unfreeze storage
unfreeze.desc: Lifts the global freeze. Subsystems resume normal behaviour at their next poll/cron tick.

reclaimPause.title: Pause reclaim daemon
reclaimPause.desc: The daemon will keep polling but skip every reclaim cycle until resumed.

reclaimResume.title: Resume reclaim daemon
reclaimResume.desc: Removes the pause flag. Daemon resumes reclaim cycles on the next poll tick.

reclaimCycle.title: Force a reclaim cycle now
reclaimCycle.desc: Queues a single ad-hoc reclaim cycle. Dispatcher will pick it up within ~60s and run as the daemon user.

backupPause.title: Pause backup pipeline
backupPause.desc: Cron will skip snapshot + retain runs until resumed. Verify and drill still work.

backupResume.title: Resume backup pipeline
backupResume.desc: Removes the pause flag. Next cron tick will create a snapshot if due.

snapshot.title: Run snapshot now
snapshot.desc: Queues an ad-hoc rsync snapshot of /mnt/nas-drive → /mnt/vps-backup. Can take hours.

verify.title: Verify last snapshot
verify.desc: Spot-checks 50 random files from the most recent snapshot manifest. Read-only.

drill.title: Run restore drill
drill.desc: Restores one random file from a recent snapshot to /tmp, verifies md5, deletes. Proves end-to-end restorability.
